# Summary Part Exemption Fixture

## Overview

This fixture pins the Part-level Summary exemption. The Part heading
below opens a grouped run of sections, and its leading Summary
section plays the same role the Part-level TL;DR section played
before the rename: prose only, with no per-section summary block and
no footer. The shape checks must exempt it by its display-case
title.

# Part 1 — Grouped run

## Summary

This Part-level Summary section carries plain prose. It deliberately
has no summary sub-heading of its own and no footer block; if the
exemption set misses the display-case spelling, both per-section
shape blockers fire here.

## Worked section

### Summary

The worked section is an ordinary section under the Part and carries
the full mandatory shape.

### Decisions & invariants

- D-records: none, fixture material only.
- The worked section closes the Part.
